beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Lille vs Nantes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 24
beIN SPORTS 2.title: Lille vs Nantes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 24
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: Lille have lost just two of their last 33 Ligue 1 matches against FC Nantes : a 1-0 home defeat in September 2015 and in Nantes in March 2025. Lille have not lost any of their last 10 home games against Nantes in all competitions, conceding only five goals in these matches. Indeed, Les Dogues have not conceded more than one goal at home against the Canaries since 1996.

beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Olympique Marseille vs Olympique Lyonnais - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 24
beIN SPORTS 2.title: Olympique Marseille vs Olympique Lyonnais - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 24
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: There have been 40 draws between Marseille and Lyon in Ligue 1, with only Marseille-Bordeaux  seeing a greater number of draws in the history of the league. However, the last draw between these two teams in the competition was in the 2020-21 season. Marseille have won each of their last three home games against Lyon in Ligue 1, as many as in their previous 14. OM could record four consecutive home wins against Les Gones for the third time, after 1952-1956 and 1993-1997.

beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Bristol City vs Watford - EFL - English Football League  SkyBet - Championship 2025/2026
beIN SPORTS 2.title: Bristol City vs Watford - EFL - English Football League  SkyBet - Championship 2025/2026
beIN SPORTS 2.desc:
Live and exclusive coverage only on beIN of the 2025–2026 EFL Championship.
The EFL Championship is the second tier in the English Football league system.
The season will run from 8 August 2025 until  2 May 2026.

beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Fulham vs Tottenham Hotspur - English Premier League
beIN SPORTS 2.title: Fulham vs Tottenham Hotspur - English Premier League
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: Fulham are looking to complete the league double over Spurs for just the second time in their history, after the 2003-04 Premier League campaign. After winning seven consecutive away league games against Fulham between 2010 and 2023, Spurs have now lost their last two at Craven Cottage by an aggregate score of 5-0.

beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Newcastle United vs Everton - English Premier League
beIN SPORTS 2.title: Newcastle United vs Everton - English Premier League
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: Newcastle are looking to complete the Premier League double over Everton for the sixth time. Only against Spurs  have the Magpies done so against a side that many times. Everton won this exact fixture 1-0 last season, last winning away at Newcastle in consecutive seasons in 2012-13/2013-14.

beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs Aston Villa - English Premier League
beIN SPORTS 2.title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs Aston Villa - English Premier League
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: Wolves have won four of their last six Premier League home games against Aston Villa  and are unbeaten in four since a 1-0 loss in December 2020. Aston Villa have won three of their last four Premier League games against Wolves, as many as in their previous 15. They’re looking to complete the Premier League double over them for the first time since 2003-04.

beIN SPORTS 2.title: EPL The Big Interview 2025/2026
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: Extended sit-downs and more informal ‘out and about’ interviews with the Premier League’s biggest stars, providing players with a platform to tell their story in their own words.

beIN SPORTS 2.title: EPL Netbusters 2025/2026
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: Highlights of the Premier League Matchweek from an alternative angle. A look back at every goal from every game using the best ISOs and Slow Motion angles.

beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: AFC Bournemouth vs Sunderland - English Premier League
beIN SPORTS 2.title: AFC Bournemouth vs Sunderland - English Premier League
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: Bournemouth have lost three of their four home league games against Sunderland, with the exception being a 2-0 victory in September 2015. Following their 3-2 victory in November, Sunderland are looking to complete their second league double over Bournemouth, after the 1989-90 second tier campaign.

beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Brighton & Hove Albion vs Nottingham Forest - English Premier League
beIN SPORTS 2.title: Brighton & Hove Albion vs Nottingham Forest - English Premier League
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: Brighton are looking to complete a league double over Nottingham Forest for the fourth time, after 1979-80, 2015-16  and 2023-24. Nottingham Forest are winless in their last five away league games against Brighton  since a 3-2 Championship victory in February 2015.

beIN SPORTS 2.title: EPL Stories 2025/2026
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: Showcasing the personalities who have shaped the Premier League era, in each episode we tell their unique story that will be sure to engage and entertain all fans.

beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Crvena Zvezda vs Lille - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Play-Offs - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 2.title: Crvena Zvezda vs Lille - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Play-Offs - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

beIN SPORTS 2.title: Burnley vs Brentford - English Premier League

beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Liverpool vs West Ham United - English Premier League
beIN SPORTS 2.title: Liverpool vs West Ham United - English Premier League

beIN SPORTS 3.desc: Elche have lost their last two LaLiga meetings against Espanyol, failing to score in both.
